The detailed '229 West Montecito Street' email (which carries Same-Day-Last-Week + 4-wk-avg comparisons) had NOT arrived yet at this run, so SDLW/4-wk fields are pending.

Strong Friday: Net +9.9% vs Fri Jun 5 ($7,458.95); Gross +9.4% vs $7,760.98.
